purpose: A single tag-like chip representing a filter value, selected option, or entity reference. Always lives inside a Tokenizer or MultiInput.
whenToUse: Inside a Tokenizer to show selected filter values
Inside MultiInput / MultiComboBox to show selected options
In FilterBar to show active filters
Anywhere users select multiple values from a set
whenNotToUse: Standalone — Token only works inside Tokenizer or MultiInput
For status — use ObjectStatus or Tag
doRules: Include a delete (×) affordance unless explicitly read-only
dontRules: Do not use Token for status — use Tag
Do not include long text — tokens should fit on one line
Do not omit the delete affordance on user-editable tokens

layoutGuidance.placement: Place Token inside a compatible container (Tokenizer, MultiInput, MultiComboBox).
layoutGuidance.sizing: Auto width unless explicitly sized; height matches density (Compact 26-32px, Cozy 36-44px).
layoutGuidance.spacing: 8px gap from adjacent elements; 16px between groups.

contentGuidance.labelLength: See doRules for specific length guidance.

responsiveBehavior.M: May condense or collapse — see Fiori responsive design guidelines.
responsiveBehavior.S: May convert to alternative pattern (Popover, Dialog) on narrow viewports.

accessibilityGuidance.ariaPattern: Maps to ARIA pattern appropriate for input — see SAP Fiori a11y docs.
accessibilityGuidance.keyboard: Full keyboard support — Tab to focus, Enter/Space to activate.

exceptions: See pluginNotes for plugin-specific rendering caveats.
